Podés entrar con tu correo y contraseña,: You can sign in with your email and password, or with your document number using your local password or the legacy consultant PIN.
Si tu cuenta local ya usa el mismo corre: If your local account already uses the same email as Google, we will link them automatically. If this is your first time signing in with Google, we will ask for your ID to link your student account.
¿Olvidaste tu contraseña? Ingresá tu cor: Forgot your password? Enter your email or document number. If the account has a recoverable email, we will send you the link to reset it.
*Le hemos enviado por correo electrónico: We have emailed your password reset link.
*No podemos encontrar un usuario con esa: We can't find a user with that email address.
*El acceso con cédula y PIN no está disp: Access with ID and PIN is not available at this time.
Bienvenido, :name: Welcome, :name

Usá el menú lateral para acceder a tus c: Use the side menu to access your academic and financial queries.
